description_long: This is a classic Volkswagen minivan, predominantly white with a thin red accent stripe running along its sides. The vehicle features a boxy, retro design with large rectangular windows on both sides, a split windshield, and a distinctive VW emblem on the front. The minivan has two front doors and a side door, all of which are open, revealing a cozy interior with red seating and a patterned rug. The wheels are metallic and modern, contrasting with the vintage body style. The rear of the van displays a blue license plate and two vertical taillights. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, with a smooth, glossy finish and minimal external accessories.
description: A classic white Volkswagen minivan with large windows, red accents, and open doors revealing a red interior. The vehicle has a retro design with a split windshield and metallic wheels.
description_view_0: Side view showing the minivan's long body, large windows, and a single open front door.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the blue license plate, rear window, and both rear and side doors open.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the side door fully open, revealing the red seating and interior rug.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the split windshield, VW emblem, and open front and side doors.
attribute_window_configuration: Three large rectangular side windows per side, split front windshield, single rear window.
